subject: Status check — where are you?
body:
Sarah — Quinn checking in. Toby asked for a team sweep. Need status on:

1. SEO blurbs (CALBEAF-157) — have you reviewed the TEST preview at calendarbeaf-test.azurewebsites.net/api/ops/seo/preview? All 8 variants (4 segments × RO/AI). Sign-off unblocks the PROD PR.
2. TT snapshot package — Layer 3 requires regression snapshot committed before any TT PROD PR. Started?
3. LOADER-CONTRACT §7.6 — I pinged you last session. Any reply/blockers?
4. Top-nav redesign brief — your Apr 17 Collab message asked for second opinion. Short answer: your scope-split rec (a: slim CalendarAppBar+CityPill+BrandMark, b: reject unified-view) is correct. Toby is NOT pivoting to single-page-with-view-param — three routes stand.
5. TIEMPO-400 + TIEMPO-406 — still Backlog despite TEST deployment. Ticket hygiene needed.

Also: what are you currently working on? Anything blocking you?

— Quinn
